    devel/llvm14: fix openmp library depends

    Use base system libelf and don't link with libffi.

    Reformat long and/or multi-line OPTION_FOO variables.

    PR:             273801
    Co-authored-by: Ivan Rozhuk <rozhuk.im@gmail.com>
